summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Paiploy UI/UX overhaul. All major requirements successfully implemented including full rebrand, emerald green color scheme, responsive design, and complete landing page with all required sections.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with complete Paiploy branding (no RecoverPay references)
Hero section with dashboard mockup displays correctly
Social proof bar, problem/solution section present
Features grid shows 6 features as required
Competitor comparison table includes Paiploy vs Churn Buster vs Churnkey vs DIY
Pricing cards show correct pricing: Free $0, Pro $39, Business $99
Final CTA and footer with 2026 Paiploy copyright
Navbar shows Paiploy logo with Features/Pricing links and Login/Start Free buttons
Login page has proper email/password form with Paiploy branding
Register page has email/password/company form with proper links
Protected routes correctly redirect to login when not authenticated
Emerald green color scheme applied throughout (40+ elements confirmed)
All navigation links and CTA buttons work correctly
Page title shows 'Paiploy - Automated Failed Payment Recovery'
Error handling and toast notification system implemented
Sidebar navigation structure in place for dashboard pages
